title: mpe.in

messages.description: set port number to listen to (0 means all ports)

voice number, type and data
end:

flags.name: -ext
flags.description:
only listen to external input source
default: log

methods.description: only listen to external input source if nonzero

body: [mpe.in] sends "cooked" MPE data from external "raw" MIDI data or an internally connected device. It outputs most common MIDI messages prepended with a voice number indexed from 0 (which depends on MIDI channel in this case).
